top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer centres on the nine-property checklist — four restated denials plus five additions. The analog explicitly enumerates: 'First: uncleavable. Second: incombustible. Third: unwettable. Fourth: undryable. Fifth: eternal. Sixth: all-pervading. Seventh: stable. Eighth: immovable. Ninth: primordial.' This nine-property exhaustive structure is unmistakably 2.24.
Possible because 2.23 also names the four denials — but the engineering analog's affirmative-list framing plus five additions is 2.24-specific.
Possible because 2.20 names the eternal-unborn pair — but 2.20 lacks the nine-property exhaustive list.
